_note: Datasets the monthly refresh (scripts/refresh.mjs) re-fetches. DLR has no working machine-readable councillor dataset (the smartdublin 'Councillor Details DLR' package is access-restricted as of 2026-07-06), so DLR rows are link-validated only and refreshed from last-good; the dlrcoco.ie directory page is the human verify-path. The LEA boundary dataset is referenced for a possible future map version — not fetched by the tool today.

reference_only.title: Local Electoral Areas - National Statutory Boundaries - Ungeneralised - 2024 (Tailte Éireann)
reference_only.note: A 2026 vintage also exists (item 95c1445f2d31416a9a16a2fdeafac97d). Licence field not shown via CKAN API — confirm on the ArcGIS Hub page before shipping a map version.
